name: Trade Ideas
description_short: AI-powered stock scanner with Holly AI for automated trade signals, real-time alerts, and backtesting for active day traders.
description_long:
Trade Ideas is the most powerful AI-driven stock scanning platform available, built specifically for active day traders who need real-time opportunities. The platform's flagship Holly AI uses machine learning to analyze millions of trading scenarios overnight and presents the highest-probability trade setups each morning before the market opens.

The Basic plan at $127/month provides real-time data, customizable layouts, alerts, and demo trading capabilities. The Premium plan at $254/month adds Holly AI, backtesting, Smart Risk Levels, and the Channel Bar for monitoring multiple scans simultaneously.

Trade Ideas is not cheap, but for serious day traders, the Holly AI and real-time scanning capabilities can pay for themselves with a single good trade. The platform is best suited for traders who are already profitable and want to scale their edge with AI-powered opportunity detection.
pros: Holly AI provides institutional-grade trade signals
Real-time scanning catches opportunities as they develop
Backtesting validates strategies against historical data
Comprehensive alert system with custom conditions
cons: Very expensive, especially the Premium plan at $254/mo
Steep learning curve to use effectively
Overkill for casual or swing traders
